reviews.review_description: Could you add a no turning option for people with stick drift?
This game is super fun and I love squirrels too! My favorite game on V.R.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Glad you're enjoying Squirrel Day! Stay tuned for the upcoming update that will include optimizations, more levels, and leaderboards. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description:
I love this game, it’s fun but the locomotion needs to improve. It’s similar to Gorilla Tag’s,  but it’s not as smooth and it’s difficult to jump from on branch to another. Also, it would be nice if this game was multiplayer. Keep up the great work!

Best regards, Nellie

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and feedback, Nellie!
Glad you like it! Thanks for the review!
Thanks for the review! Glad you're enjoying it. I'm still working on the Quest full version with all 4 seasons, Red and Grey Squirrel difficulties, 60 levels, online leaderboards, and more.

reviews.review_description: I haven’t played but sounds fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking it out! And thanks to JayBratt for the recommendation!

reviews.review_description: The graphics are still a little rough regarding the trees, but the play is amazing. Quite the upper body workout too!
